notes.delayBetweenPostsMs: Delay between posts in milliseconds. 21600000 = 6 hours, 14400000 = 4 hours, 10800000 = 3 hours
notes.postsPerDay: Max posts to post in a 24-hour period (0 = unlimited)
notes.enabled: Set to false to disable scheduling and only post from POST_TEXT env var
notes.mode: interval - posts with delay between them; cron - use specific times (not yet implemented)
